features: Comfortable Material: Made of fluffy sponge, the dusting powder puff is delicate and soft to the touch, suitable for all skin types. Its double-sided design prevents deformation and maintains its good condition even after repeated washing

Multi-functional Application: The makeup powder puff is suitable for various makeup needs, including setting powder, loose powder, contouring, and blush. It can also be used for applying body powder, providing convenient touch-ups for daily use and travel

Efficient and Economical: The setting powder puff's fine bristles effectively pick up and evenly distribute powder, reducing waste, improving makeup application efficiency, and creating a natural, finish

Easy to Use: Specially designed for large-area application, the 3.15-inch diameter powder puffs for face powder, with its sturdy ribbon handle, is easy to hold and allows for quick and even blending, enhancing the user experience

Smooth Makeup Finish: The comfortable touch of the loose powder puff makes application incredibly smooth. Lightly sweeping setting powder onto the face with the puff helps minimize pores and create a refined makeup look
